{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30373481?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/berkdedekarginoglu", "id": 30373481, "login": "berkdedekarginoglu", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwMzczNDgx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42862", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "### Summary
A Mass Assignment vulnerability exists in the tool update endpoint of FlowiseAI.

The endpoint allows authenticated users to modify server-controlled properties such as workspaceId, createdDate, and updatedDate when updating a tool resource.

Due to missing server-side validation and authorization checks, an attacker can manipulate the workspaceId field and reassign tools to arbitrary workspaces. This breaks tenant isolation in multi-workspace environments.

### Details
The endpoint responsible for updating tools:

**PUT /api/v1/tools/{toolId}**

accepts a JSON request body containing tool metadata.

However, the server does not restrict which properties may be modified by the client. As a result, user-controlled request bodies can include additional fields that should normally be controlled only by the backend.

Server-controlled fields that can be manipulated include:

1. workspaceId
2. createdDate
3. updatedDate

The request body is directly merged into the underlying database entity without proper DTO validation or authorization checks.

### PoC
Authenticate to the Flowise interface.

Capture the request used to update a tool:

```http
PUT /api/v1/tools/<TOOL_ID>
Content-Type: application/json

Modify the request body by injecting additional fields:

{
  "name": "aaa",
  "description": "bbb",
  "color": "linear-gradient(rgb(109,215,45), rgb(136,170,134))",
  "schema": "[]",
  "func": "",
  "iconSrc": "test",
  "workspaceId": "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555",
  "createdDate": "1995-03-06T14:17:50.000Z",
  "updatedDate": "1995-03-06T14:17:50.000Z"
}

```
Send the request.

Observe that the response includes the manipulated fields:

```json
{
  "workspaceId": "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555",
  "createdDate": "1995-03-06T14:17:50.000Z"
}
```

This confirms that client-controlled values are accepted and persisted by the server.

### Impact
This vulnerability allows authenticated users to manipulate internal attributes of tool resources.

Confirmed impacts include:

- Cross-workspace reassignment of tools (workspaceId)
- Unauthorized modification of metadata (createdDate, updatedDate)

In multi-tenant deployments, this may allow an attacker to move tools between workspaces without authorization, breaking tenant isolation boundaries.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00195, "percentile": 0.09241}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T14:52:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42862"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-08T16:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T14:52:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm", "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/releases/tag/flowise%403.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42862", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "FlowiseAI has Mass Assignment in Tool Update Endpoint that Allows Cross-Workspace Resource Reassignment", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T13:09:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x5v6-pj28-cwwm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: FlowiseAI has Mass Assignment in Tool Update Endpoint that Allows Cross-Workspace Resource Reassignment
